channel.title: p. bhogale - "Prasanna Bhogale"
channel.description: Data Sci, Quant Fin, Quant Bio.

item.title: "Interrogating your twin: a causal inference walkthrough"
item.description: This is the companion walkthrough for the talk Interrogating Your Twin: Causal Reasoning in Manufacturing Systems (Fifth Elephant 2026, Pune). The talk introduces Pearl's Ladder of Causation and argues that predictive maintenance needs to move beyond pattern-matching (Rung 1) to interventional reasoning (Rung 2). Here we do exactly that, with …
item.dc:creator: "Prasanna Bhogale"
